Our menu changes with the seasons. Every ingredient is sourced from local farms and brought to life by our award-winning kitchen team.

Chef's Tasting Menu →
Garlic Butter Prawns
Jumbo tiger prawns sautéed in herb-infused garlic butter, chilli flakes, fresh parsley, served with a wedge of charred lemon
$28
Fresh-Pressed Citrus Cooler
Sun-ripened oranges and lemons cold-pressed to order, served over ice with a fresh citrus wheel — no sugar added
$12
Prime Ribeye, Aged 28 Days
Hand-cut dry-aged ribeye on a charred hardwood board, finished with sea salt flakes, cracked peppercorn, fresh thyme and a red wine jus
$58
Dark Chocolate & Sea Salt Ice Cream
Three scoops of 70% Valrhona dark chocolate ice cream, hand-churned in-house, finished with Maldon sea salt flakes in a chilled silver coupe
$16

Book Your Table Tonight

Join us for an unforgettable evening. Whether it's a romantic dinner, a celebration, or a business gathering — we'll make it perfect.

Plan Your Visit

  • Open Tuesday–Sunday, 5:30 PM to 11 PM
  • Reservations recommended, walk-ins welcome
  • Private dining for groups up to 40 guests
  • Sommelier-curated wine list & craft cocktails
  • Valet parking available from 6 PM
